name: Joshua Kim (JIO)
headline: Software Developer with full-stack and technical support experience
tagline: Software Developer building full-stack web and mobile products with strong technical support and troubleshooting experience.
bio: IT Support-focused Computer Science student with hands-on experience in full-stack application support, network troubleshooting, and system diagnostics. Experienced with Next.js, React, React Native, Expo, and Node.js, and comfortable resolving authentication and access-related issues in live environments.
availability: Open to junior software engineering and IT support opportunities.

Authentication troubleshooting, technical support, and root-cause analysis in live environments.
REST API integration, backend implementation, and end-to-end feature ownership.
highlights: Built full-stack features independently across Next.js web and React Native mobile applications.
